content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/external-systems/CreateSANSystem/CreateSANSystem.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 216, 227
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: primary

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 216):
  215              type={ButtonType.submit}
  216              variant={ButtonVariant.primary}
  217              isDisabled={loading || !isFormValid}

  (line 227):
  226              type={ButtonType.button}
  227              variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}
  228            >

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 214, 224
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: ActionGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 214):
  213          <ActionGroup className="pf-v5-c-form">
  214            <Button
  215              type={ButtonType.submit}

  (line 224):
  223            </Button>
  224            <Button
  225              onClick={() => navigate(-1)}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 168
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  167            <HelperText>
  168              <HelperTextItem>
  169                {t(

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/external-systems/CreateSANSystem/CreateSANSystem.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 216, 227): `Button.variant` type changed — adding `'stateful'` to the union. Looking at the actual code:
- Line 216: `variant={ButtonVariant.primary}` — `primary` is still valid in the new type. No change needed.
- Line 227: `variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}` — `secondary` is still valid in the new type. No change needed.

Both values (`primary` and `secondary`) exist in both the old and new type unions. This is a type expansion (adding `'stateful'`), not a removal. **No code change needed.**

**Fix 2** (Lines 214, 224): Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`. Looking at the code:
- Line 214-222: `<Button ...>{t('Connect and create')}</Button>` — contains only text, no icon. **No change needed.**
- Line 224-230: `<Button ...>{t('Cancel')}</Button>` — contains only text, no icon. **No change needed.**

Neither Button contains an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. **No code change needed.**

**Fix 3** (Line 168): Icon children to `icon` prop on `<HelperTextItem>`. Looking at the code:
- Line 168-172: `<HelperTextItem>{t('Select one or more...')}</HelperTextItem>` — contains only text, no icon. **No change needed.**

The HelperTextItem contains only a text string, no icon element. **No code change needed.**

One thing I do notice: Line 213 has `className="pf-v6-c-form"` which appears to already be migrated to v6 (from `pf-v5-c-form`). This confirms previous migration passes have been applied.

All three fixes target code patterns that don't actually need changes in this file — the values used are still valid, and there are no icons to move.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Button.variant type change at lines 216, 227): **No change needed** — The values `ButtonVariant.primary` and `ButtonVariant.secondary` are both valid in the new type union. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option.

2. **Fix 2** (icon children to `icon` prop on Button at lines 214, 224): **No change needed** — Neither Button instance contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. Both contain only text children (`{t('Connect and create')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`).

3. **Fix 3** (icon children to `icon` prop on HelperTextItem at line 168): **No change needed** — The HelperTextItem contains only a translated text string, not an icon element.
